data.title: 61 mln Shiba Inu burned in a week – Will this help SHIB reach $0.000020?
data.description:
A successful retest above $0.000017 could propel Shiba Inu by 18% and take it toward the $0.000020 level.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/61-mln-shiba-inu-burned-in-a-week-will-this-help-shib-reach-0-000020/

data.title: Glassnode Co-Founders Issue Bitcoin Alert, Say BTC To Fall if ‘Conditions Don’t Improve’
data.description:
The co-founders of the market intelligence platform Glassnode are warning that Bitcoin (BTC) may decline if two main conditions don’t start improving. In a new thread on the social media platform X, Glassnode and Swissblock co-founders Jan Happel and Yann Alleman – who together share the handle Negentropic – say that Bitcoin is at risk […]
The post Glassnode Co-Founders Issue Bitcoin Alert,...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/13/glassnode-co-founders-issue-bitcoin-alert-say-btc-to-fall-if-conditions-dont-improve/

data.title: Trump Predicts Stability In Global Tariffs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump announced on February 14 that tariffs in many countries are expected to remain unchanged. He advised against anticipating any exemptions or reductions in these tariffs.

data.title: CZ lets memecoin traders fight it out for Broccoli dominance
data.description:

data.title: Dollar Index DXY Experiences Short-Term Increase
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 14, the Dollar Index (DXY) experienced a brief surge of nearly 50 points, currently standing at 107.71.

data.title: OpenSea goes multichain after 98% drop in volume
data.description:
OpenSea is airdropping a token, relaunching its website, cutting fees, and adding blockchains. Trading volumes, however, are still declining.
The post OpenSea goes multichain after 98% drop in volume appeared first on Protos.
source: https://protos.com/opensea-goes-multichain-after-98-drop-in-volume/

data.title: Cardano Echoes 2020-2021 Pattern – Is A Parabolic Rally On The Horizon?
data.description:
Cardano is trading below the $0.80 mark as it flirts with a potential rebound after weeks of volatility and selling pressure. The broader crypto market is finding strong demand at current levels, and investors are cautiously optimistic about a quick recovery rally into multi-year highs. Despite the bearish sentiment that has gripped the market recently, many believe that Cardano could lead the...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/cardano/cardano-echoes-2020-2021-pattern-is-a-parabolic-rally-on-the-horizon/

data.title: South Korea reviews ban on corporations trading virtual assets
data.description:
South Korea lifts crypto ban for companies. The ban lift has been structured in a two-phase plan. The move coincides with the enactment and enforcement of South Korea’s Virtual Asset User Protection Act. South Korea’s Financial Services Commission (FSC) has announced plans to gradually lift the ban on corporations trading virtual assets, signaling a new […]
The post South Korea reviews ban on...
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/south-korea-reviews-ban-on-corporations-trading-virtual-assets/
